page.content: In the Telehealth Metrics for HCA Healthcare covering the period ending December 2023, the utilization rates demonstrate a progressive increase across the four quarters; Q1 2023 recorded a Utilization Rate of 70.5% with Revenue of $2.5M from 75 Patient Visits and an Average Revenue per Visit of $1.5M, incurring Total Costs of $1.2M, and achieving a Profit Margin of 45%.

page.content: For Q2 2023, the Utilization Rate rose to 72.3% with Revenue at $2.6M from 80 Patient Visits and an Average Revenue per Visit of $1.6M, with Total Costs of $1.3M and a Profit Margin of 46%. In Q3 2023, the Utilization Rate increased further to 73.8%, generating Revenue of $2.7M from 85 Patient Visits and an Average Revenue per Visit of $1.8M, with Total Costs of $1.5M and a Profit Margin of 47%. Finally, Q4 2023 saw a Utilization Rate reaching 75.0%, yielding Revenue of $2.8M from 90 Patient Visits with an Average Revenue per Visit of $1.9M, resulting in Total Costs of $1.6M and a Profit Margin of 48%. The Year-to-Date figures reflect a Utilization Rate of 65.5%, Total Revenue of $3.0M from 80 Patient Visits, and an Average Revenue per Patient of $125. The Overall Patient Satisfaction Rate stands at 89.5% with Average Costs per Visit at $82.5, while the Profit Before Tax is recorded at $900K.
